name: Green Mountain Potato Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Maine potatoes (4 medium), peeled and cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring beef broth to a boil and add potatoes, carrots, tomatoes, leeks, celery root, parsley, bay leaf, thyme, salt, and pepper. Return to boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, dice the pumpernickel bread and bacon. Fry the bacon in a skillet until it is partly cooked. Add the diced pumpernickel and fry until both the bacon and bread are dark and crisp. Set aside.
3. When vegetables are tender, remove parsley and bay leaf from the chowder. Blend in sour cream or yogurt. Adjust seasonings to taste.
4. Simmer for another minute. Ladle chowder into serving bowls and garnish with croutons and bacon. The flavor improves with reheating; make chowder in advance if possible. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
